# Flowcore AI
> AI-powered customer service orchestration platform for WhatsApp and webchat. Automate responses, manage bookings, and escalate to humans when it matters.

## Essentials
- Flowcore AI: https://7flowcore.vercel.app
- Features: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/features
- Pricing: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/pricing
- FAQ: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/faq
- Changelog: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/changelog
- Blog: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/blog
- Case Studies: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/case-studies

## Legal
- Privacy Policy: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/legal/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/legal/terms
- Cookie Policy: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/legal/cookie-policy
- Refund Policy: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/legal/refund-policy
- Data Processing Agreement: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/legal/dpa
- Acceptable Use Policy: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/legal/aup
- Data Deletion: https://7flowcore.vercel.app/legal/data-deletion

## Platform
- Flowcore AI provides AI-powered customer service automation for WhatsApp and webchat.
- Supports appointment booking, order management, and product inquiries via AI agents.
- Unified inbox for managing conversations across WhatsApp, webchat, and email.
- Knowledge base management for training AI agents on business-specific information.
- Human escalation when AI cannot resolve a query.
- Analytics dashboard with real-time metrics on messages, conversations, and automation rates.
- GoWA (Go WhatsApp API) integration for WhatsApp messaging without Meta Cloud API.
- Works with Google Calendar, Google Sheets, and Gmail integrations.

## Getting Started
1. Sign up at https://7flowcore.vercel.app/login
2. Complete business profile setup during onboarding
3. Configure AI agents (Support, Sales, Appointment Booking)
4. Connect WhatsApp by scanning QR code via GoWA
5. Add knowledge base documents and custom prompts
6. Go live — AI handles customer conversations automatically
